'''''Star Wars Manga: Silver''''' is a limited edition of the [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga|manga One-Shots]] published by [[Tokyopop]]. It is the second issue following ''[[Star Wars Manga: Black]]''. Although [[Leland Chee]] himself has stated that their [[canon]] status is fuzzy,<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> the stories in this issue are all labeled as Infinites in the most recent French collection.

==Contents==
===Stories===
*''[[Perfect Evil]]'' Part 2'' by [[Shin-Ichi Hiromoto|Hiromoto-SIN-ichi]]
*''[[Oh!! Jawajawa]]'' by [[Hitoshi Ariga]]
*''[[Star Wars -Phantasmagoria-]]'' by [[Baron Ueda]]
*''[[Vader vs. Artoo & Threepio]]'' by [[Makomo Nakatsuka]]
*[[Dark Jedi (comic story)|''Dark Jedi'']] by [[Yasushi Nirasawa]]

===Illustrations===
[[File:VaderKaida.jpg|left|thumb|Illustration by Yuji Kaida]]
In addition to the stories, this issue contains two colored fold-out illustrations of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] by [[Yuji Kaida]] and [[Kia Asamiya]].
